The '''Z-10 ''Seeker''-class scout ship''' was a [[Scout ship/Legends|scout ship]] manufactured by [[Starfeld Industries/Legends|Starfeld Industries]].

==Characteristics==
[[File:Z10SeekerSchematics-SS.png|thumb|left|180px|Z-10 Seeker schematics]]
It was 20.3 meters long, carrying 1 [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]], 2 passengers, 2 months worth of [[Foodstuff/Legends|consumables]], 5 metric tons within the [[Starship/Legends|ship]], and 20 optional additional metric tons of cargo per each of two cargo pods attached.<ref name="SS" />

The ship could achieve a speed of 1000 kilometers per hour in [[Atmosphere/Legends|atmosphere]]. A [[Miradyne Limited]] [[RCS-1]] flight control [[Computer/Legends|computer]] and [[Novaldex/Legends|Novaldex]] [[JV-71 ion engine]] allowed sublight speed, which was slowed down and reduced in maneuverability if the cargo pods were attached. The ship had a Class 1 [[Hyperdrive/Legends|hyperdrive]] and a Class 12 backup.<ref name="SS" />

Though unshielded, the craft had a [[Fabritech/Legends|Fabritech]] [[ANx-y/2 sensor cluster]] and a forward [[BlasTech Industries/Legends|BlasTech Industries]] [[Prm-3 pulse laser cannon]]. The cannon was under-powered and could only fire in a limited forward-facing arc. Targeting was provided by the Fabritech sensor, but this meant that if it wasn't working, the vehicle was defenseless.<ref name="BG" />

The Seeker was created as a replacement to the [[Vangaard Industries]] [[Pathfinder-class scout ship|Pathfinder]].<ref name="BG" /> It was used as a scout by the [[Scout Force]] or as a courier in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] by private interests and criminals.
